info.title: AXPO Simulador de Ofertas - Internal API v1
info.description:
# Internal API

Secure internal API for AXPO simulation management with role-based access control.

## Features
- RBAC (Admin/Agent/Commercial)
- Simulation versioning and cloning
- Base values management with versioning
- Audit logging for all critical operations
- Soft delete preservation

## Authentication
- **Bearer JWT token** (required)

## Base URL
- `/api/v1/internal`

## Response Format
All responses follow a standard structure:
```json
{
  "success": true/false,
  "data": {...},
  "error": {
    "code": "ERROR_CODE",
    "message": "Human-readable message",
    "details": {...}
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-03-11T10:00:00Z"
}
```

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token for internal API access

get.description: Get a specific agency by id (Admin sees any, others only their own)
List all agencies (Admin sees all, others see only their agency)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for filtering agencies by name

post.description: Create a new agency (Admin role required)

400.description: Validation error or agency already exists

get.summary: Return analytics overview with trends, breakdowns and activity data

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days for trend data (7, 30 or 90)

post.summary: Authenticate user with email and password
post.description: Login with email and password to receive a JWT token for authenticated requests

post.summary: Register user account (Admin or Agent with restrictions)
post.description: Create a new user account (Admin only or Agent creating COMMERCIAL in their agency)

password.description: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character

post.summary: Activate base value set and deactivate siblings in same scope

get.summary: List items for base value set

put.summary: Replace all items in base value set

post.summary: Upload and import AXPO Excel price file
post.description: Uploads an AXPO .xlsm file, parses it, and creates a new base value set

replace.description: If true, replaces items in existing set with same name (default false)

get.description: Get a specific client (Admin sees any, Agent sees only their agency's clients)

403.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to access this client

patch.description: Update client information (Admin or Agent from same agency)

get.description: List all clients (Admin sees all, Agent sees only their agency's clients)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by client name, CIF, or contact name

post.description: Create a new client (Admin or Agent)

get.summary: Get an email template by ID

post.summary: Send test email using a template

recipientEmail.description: Email address to send the test to

templateId.description: ID of the email template to test

sampleVariables.description: Optional sample data for template variables

get.summary: Get a PDF template by ID
Look up previously used CUPS codes with associated client data
get.description: Returns distinct CUPS codes used in past simulations, optionally filtered by client. Useful for auto-completing the CUPS field in the simulation form.

post.summary: Run price calculation against the latest simulation version
post.description:
Loads the latest SimulationVersion's payloadJson (typed as SimulationPayload),
fetches BaseValueItems for the resolved price set, runs CalculationService,
and persists the results into a new SimulationVersion.

baseValueSetId.description: Optional override for the price set to use

post.summary: Generate PDF from simulation HTML template

htmlContent.description: HTML content to convert to PDF

post.summary: Store OCR prefill data as a new simulation version
Refresh shared simulation PIN snapshot from owner current PIN

get.summary: Get indexed price history data for a simulation

200.description: Price history data including indexed margins per product/tariff/period

patch.summary: Update simulation and create version when payload changes

post.summary: Send simulation email with optional PDF attachment

pdfHtmlContent.description: If provided, a PDF will be generated from this HTML and attached

get.description: List simulations based on user role (Admin sees all, Agent sees agency's, Commercial sees own)

post.description: Create a new simulation with its first version

get.description: List users based on role (Admin sees all, Agent sees agency's, Commercial not allowed)

403.description: Forbidden - Commercial users cannot list users

post.summary: Create a user (Admin or Agent with restrictions)
post.description: Create a new user (Admin can create any, Agent can only create COMMERCIAL in their agency)

400.description: Validation error or user already exists
